title: Port Spring (damped harmonic oscillator) from Go to Crystal
description: Implement Harmonica::Spring struct with fps helper, three damping cases, and update method. Follow Crystal naming conventions (Spring.new, #update).

title: Add documentation and run quality gates
description: Add Crystal docs to all public methods, update README with Crystal examples, run crystal tool format, ameba, crystal spec, and rumdl fmt.

title: Setup Crystal project structure for Harmonica port
description: Create directory structure: src/harmonica/, spec/harmonica/. Update src/harmonica.cr as main module file with re-exports. Update shard.yml with proper metadata.

title: Port Projectile physics from Go to Crystal
description: Implement Point, Vector structs, Projectile class with Gravity/TerminalGravity constants. Port NewProjectile, Update, Position, Velocity, Acceleration methods.

title: Port Go tests to Crystal specs
description: Create spring_spec.cr (new tests) and projectile_spec.cr (port from Go). Maintain same test values and thresholds. Use approx matcher for floating-point comparisons.
